headline: AUDIT-READY, EVERY TIME
subheading: The structured GMP checklist that closes compliance gaps before the MHRA ever finds them.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking pharmaceutical quality auditing and systematic compliance verification: a glowing deep-navy grid of interconnected glass panels, each holding a softly illuminated checkmark and abstract data glyphs, arranged in five clean vertical columns like inspected quality systems. Luminous teal and cyan light traces flow between the panels as audit trails, weaving an unbroken thread of verification through every layer, while a single fresh-green indicator node pulses at a critical checkpoint. Floating translucent layers of fingerprint-like data-integrity patterns drift behind frosted brushed-steel surfaces, with crisp magnifying-glass lens flares catching cool daylight and elegant bokeh receding into shallow depth of field. Premium clinical-luxury mood, immaculate precision, deep navy background with teal-cyan glow and a subtle green accent, refined and trustworthy. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
